name: Peanut Brittle - 2 Pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously butter two cookie sheets.
2. In a large heavy saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, and water.
3. Cook until the sugar dissolves, stirring constantly.
4. Continue cooking until a candy thermometer reaches the hard crack stage (300°F), stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla and baking soda.
6. Pour onto cookie sheets and spread as thin as possible.
7. Cool completely.
8. Break into pieces.
9. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
Makes 2 lbs.
